line_exceptions.content_reader/polish.py: Pre-existing cohesive Stage 2 pipeline; splitting it is outside this companion boundary.
line_exceptions.content_reader/server.py: Pre-existing local HTTP router; the new credential state and pairing view are isolated in focused modules.
line_exceptions.content_reader/store.py: Pre-existing storage compatibility surface shared by folder and Obsidian modes.
line_exceptions.web/app.js: Pre-existing browser workflow controller; the new transport and pairing workflows are separate modules.
line_exceptions.web/index.html: Pre-existing declarative application shell with dialogs and accessibility labels.
line_exceptions.web/styles.css: Pre-existing cohesive application stylesheet; the new connection screen has its own stylesheet.
